meaning: n.死记硬背,机械的做法,生搬硬套
examples: He is very sceptical about the value of rote learning.
His poor method of learning by rote made him unable to deal with the problems in his work flexibly.
They say, oh, this is rote learning.
"The worst thing in the world to me is to play by rote, " he says.
Instead we get Teaching By Rote 2.0 and a deeper entrenchment of the school-as-assembly-line model.
